ast.name: error
ast.source: [slick-mermaid] Mermaid patch failed; plugin stays enabled
ast.target: [slick-mermaid] Mermaid 补丁失败；插件保持启用状态

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How much diagram boxes stand out from the note behind them. Turn down to blend in; turn up for stronger contrast.
ast.target: 图表框相对于其背后笔记的突出程度。调低以融入背景；调高以增强对比度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Flowcharts and similar diagrams pick up the same color tone as pie charts and git graphs. Lines and text stay neutral so labels stay readable.
ast.target: 流程图和类似图表会采用与饼图和 Git 图表相同的色调。线条和文本保持中性，以便标签保持可读性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Softens sharp corners on flowchart nodes, class diagrams, sequence participants, and ER entity boxes. ER inner cells stay square.
ast.target: 柔化流程图节点、类图、序列参与者和 ER 实体框的尖角。ER 内部单元格保持方形。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How round the corners are. Higher values look more pill-shaped.
ast.target: 圆角的程度。数值越高，看起来越像药丸形状。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applies to git graphs, pie charts, journey maps, and similar diagrams with several colored parts. Shades keeps one color family; Rainbow gives each part its own hue.
ast.target: 适用于 Git 图表、饼图、旅程图以及具有多个彩色部分的类似图表。色阶保持同一色系；彩虹为每个部分赋予不同的色相。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When off, colors follow your note background. When on, you pick the color that sets the tone for charts and tinted diagram boxes.
ast.target: 关闭时，颜色跟随您的笔记背景。开启时，您可以选择为图表和着色图表框设定基调的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Charts and tinted boxes build from this color—lighter and darker versions of the same hue.
ast.target: 图表和着色框基于此颜色构建——同一色相的更浅和更深版本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On charts with several sections (branches, slices, steps), how different each color looks from the next. Low = similar; high = easy to tell apart.
ast.target: 对于具有多个部分（分支、切片、步骤）的图表，每个颜色与下一个颜色的差异程度。低 = 相似；高 = 易于区分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Fine-tunes the slider above. 100% is the default. Lower blends colors together; higher pushes them further apart.
ast.target: 微调上方的滑块。100% 是默认值。调低会混合颜色；调高会使它们进一步分离。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Extra space around text on arrows between boxes—like margin inside the label background.
ast.target: 箭头连接框之间文本周围的额外空间——类似于标签背景内的边距。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How rounded the small background behind text on connectors is.
ast.target: 连接器上文本背后小背景的圆角程度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls when the enlarge button appears on diagrams embedded in your notes.
ast.target: 控制嵌入笔记中的图表上放大按钮何时出现。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Double-click a diagram in your note to open a larger view—without using the button.
ast.target: 双击笔记中的图表可打开更大视图——无需使用按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Some flowchart labels with (parentheses) fail in Obsidian. Turn this on to auto-fix them so the diagram renders.
ast.target: 一些带有（括号）的流程图标签在 Obsidian 中会失败。开启此选项可自动修复它们，以便图表正常渲染。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Treats \n in label text as a line break so you can stack text inside a box.
ast.target: 将标签文本中的 \\n 视为换行符，以便您可以在框内堆叠文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When off (default), diagrams follow your Obsidian theme. When on, custom colors written in the Mermaid block are kept—even if they clash with the theme.
ast.target: 关闭时（默认），图表遵循您的 Obsidian 主题。开启时，Mermaid 代码块中编写的自定义颜色会被保留——即使它们与主题冲突。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restore all options above to their original defaults.
ast.target: 将以上所有选项恢复为其原始默认值。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 选择您自己的基础颜色

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 部分之间的颜色分离度

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用图表代码中的颜色

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Slick Mermaid: Mermaid is not available on window.
ast.target: Slick Mermaid：Mermaid 在 window 上不可用。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Slick Mermaid: Mermaid returned invalid SVG.
ast.target: Slick Mermaid：Mermaid 返回了无效的 SVG。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Drag to pan | Wheel to zoom | Double-click to fit | Esc to close
ast.target: 拖动平移 | 滚轮缩放 | 双击适应 | Esc 关闭
